business_sources_osm_key.name: business_sources_osm_key
business_sources_osm_key.where: source_type = 'osm' and source_ref is not null

businesses_rejection_reason_check.name: businesses_rejection_reason_check
businesses_rejection_reason_check.value: rejection_reason is null or rejection_reason in ('too_small', 'too_large', 'wrong_industry', 'franchise_or_national', 'weak_evidence', 'no_decision_maker', 'existing_software_sufficient', 'duplicate', 'poor_fit', 'other')

suppression_list_any_field_check.name: suppression_list_any_field_check
suppression_list_any_field_check.value: domain is not null or email is not null or phone is not null or company_name is not null
